parameters.query:
SELECT id, title, agency, stage, pwin, estimated_value, naics, due_date
FROM gda_opportunities
WHERE stage NOT IN ('Won', 'Lost', 'No-Bid', 'Cancelled')
  AND pwin > 0
ORDER BY pwin DESC, estimated_value DESC NULLS LAST
LIMIT 5

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS gda_nightly_intel (
  id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
  opp_id INT,
  title TEXT,
  agency TEXT,
  intel TEXT,
  citation_count INT DEFAULT 0,
  citations JSONB DEFAULT '[]',
  created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW()
);
INSERT INTO gda_nightly_intel (opp_id, title, agency, intel, citation_count, citations)
VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, $5, $6)

parameters.jsCode:
var count = $('Store Nightly Intel').all().length;
return [{ json: { status: 'complete', opps_researched: count, timestamp: new Date().toISOString() } }];
